name: default_multi_tag_profile
description: Default decomposition slices for SUMO Petersen matrix normalization and platform export.

slices.name: heterotroph_carbon_core
slices.description: Ordinary heterotrophic carbon conversion processes, excluding PAO/GAO phosphorus removal branches.

slices.name: autotroph_nitrogen_core
slices.description: Autotrophic nitrogen conversion processes including AOB, NOB and Anammox.

slices.name: phosphorus_pao_gao_core
slices.description: Phosphorus-oriented PAO/GAO and chemical phosphorus storage or release processes.

slices.name: nitrification_two_step
slices.description: Two-step nitrification and related AOB/NOB reaction blocks.

slices.name: digestion_two_step
slices.description: Digestion-related methylotrophic and gas-forming process blocks.

slices.name: nitrogen_four_step_pathway
slices.description: Four-step nitrogen transformation pathway covering NO3, NO2, NO and N2O branches.
